title: STAT 210 Final Eportfolio: Alondra Casas
text: This Quarto website is my final eportfolio!

title: About me
text:
About this site
Hello! My name is Alondra Casas and I am a fourth year undergraduate marine science student at CSUMB in Dr. Canner’s STAT210 course. I’ve decided to take this class to strengthen my r skills and widen my knowledge. I’m from Los Angeles, California and after graduation I am going to graduate school to get my M.S. in Ecology, Evolution, and Marine Biology at the University of California, Santa Barbara!
This is my final portfolio on data collected from my research project during my internship over the last year at the Monterey Bay Aquarium.
